details.neighbor_body: Default Auth Policy enforces authentication for all Backstage backend requests unless dangerouslyDisableDefaultAuthPolicy is set to true during migration.
Default Auth Policy enforces authentication for all Backstage backend requests unless dangerouslyDisableDefaultAuthPolicy is set to true during migration.
ADR005: Catalog entities are modeled around three core constructs: Component (software piece), API (component boundaries), and Resource (runtime infrastructure).
ADR005: Catalog entities are modeled around three core constructs: Component (software piece), API (component boundaries), and Resource (runtime infrastructure).
Burstable disk types are strictly prohibited for GitLab reference architectures due to inconsistent I/O latency.
Burstable disk types are strictly prohibited for GitLab reference architectures due to inconsistent I/O latency.
Execute GitLab background migrations via batched Sidekiq jobs to ensure parallel execution without exceeding database statement timeouts.
Execute GitLab background migrations via batched Sidekiq jobs to ensure parallel execution without exceeding database statement timeouts.
Legacy GitLab background migrations were replaced wholesale by the batched background migration framework for enhanced control.

Define RBAC permission policies via the Backstage UI to generate YAML rules that map users to resources like catalog-entity.

The Search plugin utilizes the SearchApi to communicate with the search-backend, querying indices compiled by collators like DefaultCatalogCollatorFactory.
The Backstage Search Plugin aggregates documents across TechDocs, Catalog Entities, and APIs using composable index collators.

The API Docs plugin processes OpenAPI, AsyncAPI, and GraphQL specifications into interactive REST visualization panels tied to Catalog components.

Grafana plugins present alert dashboard integrations utilizing metrics annotated directly onto Backstage entities.

TechDocs deprecates the TechDocsApi in favor of the routing mechanisms available in @backstage/plugin-techdocs-react for accessing generated documentation.
